case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ANGELA GENOCHIO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-16-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GENOCHIO, ANGELA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GENOCHIO, ANGELA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENOCHIO, ANGELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 51 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GENOCHIO, ANGELA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT GENOCHIO, ANGELA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-16-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GENOCHIO, ANGELA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $9.43 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
